title: launaea fragilis var. pumila
intro: Launaea fragilis var. pumila, also known as a small, succulent plant, is a variety of the Launaea fragilis species. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Launaea fragilis var. pumila include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially aiding in the management of diabetes and hypertension. Herbal preparations of Launaea fragilis var. pumila often involve drying and crushing the plant's leaves and stems, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or topical creams.
